content: Mozambique gambling is regulated by IGJ (Inspeccao Geral de Jogos) under Law 1/2010 (revised 2022/2024); online sports betting requires a specific Sports Betting License from IGJ/Ministry of Tourism -- online casino has no equivalent license path yet. A P2P/exchange-style betting product likely still qualifies as 'sports betting' requiring this license; age 18+ is legal minimum. Investment/capital thresholds for operators have reportedly been reduced but figures found in secondary sources are inconsistent and should be confirmed with a local gambling law advisor, not treated as legal advice.
